assignments.name: Assign_Capital_to_record_collection_variable
assignments.label: Assign Capital to record collection variable

decisions.description: Checks to see if there is an approved Phase Request (meaning they will have active Phase Baselines).
decisions.name: Approved_Phase_Request_not_found
decisions.label: Approved Phase Request not found

decisions.name: Does_a_Drawdown_for_this_month_already_exists
decisions.label: Does a Drawdown for this month already exists?

rules.name: Drawdown_already_exists_for_this_month
rules.label: Drawdown already exists for this month

decisions.description: Checks to see if the summarised total of the Capital & A&A Funding requested exceeds what is remaining in the grant for this FY.
decisions.name: Does_Capital_A_A_Funding_exceed_the_remaining_grant_for_this_FY
decisions.label: Does Capital & A&A Funding exceed the remaining grant for this FY
decisions.defaultConnectorLabel: Does not exceed remaining in this FY

decisions.description: Checks to see if the selected Phase is "Active" (Approved)
decisions.name: Is_Phase_Active
decisions.label: Is Phase Active?

decisions.name: Is_remaining_after_request_in_the_minus
decisions.label: Is remaining after request in the minus?

rules.name: Outcome_1_of_More_than_1_Financial_year
rules.label: Outcome 1 of More than 1 Financial year

decisions.description: Checks what financial year we're currently in and assigns the correct "Grant Spend" from the funding award to a variable.
decisions.name: What_is_the_current_financial_year
decisions.label: What is the current financial year?

Flow.description: Screen flow on the Warm Homes portal that allows GR's (for Challenge Funds & Strategic Partnerships) to submit monthly Funding Drawdown Requests that are created as Funding Drawdown Request records, which are related to both the Funding Award and Baseline record.

formulas.name: CurrentFinancialYear
formulas.expression: IF( MONTH(TODAY()) >= 3, TEXT(YEAR(TODAY())) + "-" + TEXT(YEAR(TODAY()) + 1), TEXT(YEAR(TODAY()) - 1) + "-" + TEXT(YEAR(TODAY())) )

formulas.name: CurrentFY
formulas.expression: AND( DATEVALUE({!Copy_1_of_Loop_through_all_approved_funding_drawdowns.Funding_Disbursement__r.DisbursementDate}) >= DATE( IF(MONTH(TODAY()) >= 4, YEAR(TODAY()), YEAR(TODAY()) - 1), 4, 1 ), DATEVALUE({!Copy_1_of_Loop_through_all_approved_funding_drawdowns.Funding_Disbursement__r.DisbursementDate}) <= DATE( IF(MONTH(TODAY()) >= 4, YEAR(TODAY()) + 1, YEAR(TODAY())), 3, 31 ) )

Flow.label: GMS - Funding Drawdown Request

loops.name: Copy_1_of_Loop_through_all_approved_funding_drawdowns
loops.label: Loop through all approved funding drawdowns

loops.name: Loop_through_all_approved_funding_drawdowns
loops.label: Loop through all approved funding drawdowns

loops.name: Loop_through_Phase_Drawdown_Collection_Line_Items
loops.label: Loop through Phase Drawdown Collection Line Items

recordLookups.description: Gets all previously approved (Paid) funding drawdowns, to work out how much has already been drawndown to the GR
recordLookups.name: Copy_1_of_Get_Approved_Funding_Drawdowns
recordLookups.label: Get Approved Funding Drawdowns

recordLookups.name: Get_Approved_Funding_Drawdown_Request_Line_Items
recordLookups.label: Get Approved Funding Drawdown Request Line Items

recordLookups.description: Gets all previously approved (Paid) funding drawdowns, to work out how much has already been drawndown to the GR
recordLookups.name: Get_Approved_Funding_Drawdowns
recordLookups.label: Get Approved Funding Drawdowns

recordLookups.name: Get_existing_drawdown_request_for_this_month
recordLookups.label: Get existing drawdown request for this month

fields.name: Appendix1
fields.fieldText:
APPENDIX 1 

 

GRANT DRAWDOWN REQUEST FORM 

 

CLAIM FOR PAYMENT OF GRANT 

 

This form must be used when you wish to claim an instalment of the Grant for spend incurred, when making a Grant Drawdown Request, as set out in the standard terms and conditions of in the Grant Funding Agreement.

 

Claims should be made two months in advance of the requested payment date, and claim amounts should align with the amounts forecast for that month in the monthly data upload. 

 

Claims should be made for spend incurred. Grant Recipients do not need to wait for work to be invoiced or paid before they can claim for costs incurred (defined as any Eligible Expenditure committed and accrued, as long as the activity is due for completion within the Funding Period which is defined in the GFA). 

 

You are not required to submit evidence of spend incurred alongside this claim form.  

However, proof of spend incurred will be required separately, as a minimum as part of the Evidence Check (Reconciliation) process that is carried out three times per year. We may request, and You must supply, proof of expenditure and any other supporting documentation and information (in addition to the Grant Drawdown Request Form) as We require.

fields.name: approvedphaserequest
fields.fieldText: Drawdown Request for Approved Phase {!Loop_through_selected_Phases.Baseline_Version__c}

fields.name: Capital_Costs_Only_Approved_Phase
fields.helpText: Input your capital costs here

validationRule.errorMessage: Capital costs cannot be higher than the capital remaining for this phase

fields.name: ChoosePhasesDisplayText
fields.fieldText:
Grant Drawdown Request for {!Get_Award_Baseline.Baseline_Version__c}


Following the approval of your first phase request, you must then have your subsequent phase requests approved to drawdown any capital funding related to that phase. If you do not have any subsequent phase requests approved, you can only access your A&A funding. 

 

If you submit multiple drawdowns ahead of a phase or ahead of your FRA/FMP being signed off, we need to ensure the totality of these drawdowns does not exceed the 20% of your total grant spend.

value.stringValue: [{"apiName":"Baseline_Version__c","guid":"column-2ba8","editable":false,"hasCustomHeaderLabel":false,"customHeaderLabel":"","wrapText":true,"order":0,"label":"Baseline Version","type":"customRichText"},{"apiName":"Baseline_Start_Date__c","guid":"column-f65d","editable":false,"hasCustomHeaderLabel":false,"customHeaderLabel":"","wrapText":true,"order":1,"label":"Baseline Start Date","type":"date-local"},{"apiName":"Baseline_End_Date__c","guid":"column-445d","editable":false,"hasCustomHeaderLabel":false,"customHeaderLabel":"","wrapText":true,"order":2,"label":"Baseline End Date","type":"date-local"},{"apiName":"Baseline_Grant_Capital_Spend__c","guid":"column-a738","editable":false,"hasCustomHeaderLabel":true,"customHeaderLabel":"Capital Awarded","wrapText":true,"order":3,"label":"Baseline Grant Capital Spend","type":"currency"},{"apiName":"Challenge_Fund_Capital_Drawn_Down__c","guid":"column-874d","editable":false,"hasCustomHeaderLabel":true,"customHeaderLabel":"Capital Recieved","wrapText":true,"order":4,"label":"Challenge Fund Capital Drawn Down","type":"currency"},{"apiName":"Challenge_Fund_Capital_Remaining__c","guid":"column-e524","editable":false,"hasCustomHeaderLabel":true,"customHeaderLabel":"Capital Remaining","wrapText":true,"order":5,"label":"Challenge Fund Capital Remaining","type":"currency"}]

fields.name: Copy_1_of_Appendix1
fields.fieldText:
APPENDIX 1 

 

GRANT DRAWDOWN REQUEST FORM 

 

CLAIM FOR PAYMENT OF GRANT 

 

This form must be used when you wish to claim an instalment of the Grant for spend incurred, when making a Grant Drawdown Request, as set out in the standard terms and conditions of in the Grant Funding Agreement.

 

Claims should be made two months in advance of the requested payment date, and claim amounts should align with the amounts forecast for that month in the monthly data upload. 

 

Claims should be made for spend incurred. Grant Recipients do not need to wait for work to be invoiced or paid before they can claim for costs incurred (defined as any Eligible Expenditure committed and accrued, as long as the activity is due for completion within the Funding Period which is defined in the GFA). 

 

You are not required to submit evidence of spend incurred alongside this claim form.  

However, proof of spend incurred will be required separately, as a minimum as part of the Evidence Check (Reconciliation) process that is carried out three times per year. We may request, and You must supply, proof of expenditure and any other supporting documentation and information (in addition to the Grant Drawdown Request Form) as We require.

fields.name: Copy_2_of_Copy_1_of_No_Phase_Baselines
fields.fieldText:
There is currently no "Active" financial year baseline for this funding award for the current financial year.


Please review your financial year baselines to ensure they're up to date or contact an administrator for support, thank you.

fields.name: drawdownrequesttext
fields.fieldText: Grant Drawdown Request for {!FYBaselineVersion}

fields.name: Copy_1_of_Remaining_Grant_after_Drawdown_Request
fields.fieldText: Total Grant Funding Remaining after Drawdown Request

fields.name: Copy_1_of_drawdownrequesttext1
fields.fieldText:
Grant Drawdown Request for {!Get_Award_Baseline.Baseline_Version__c}


The total amount requested exceeds the remaining financial year funding you have available, please go back and adjust your drawdown requests for each phase to be able to submit this request.

fields.name: Copy_1_of_Copy_1_of_Copy_1_of_Remaining_Grant_after_Drawdown_Request
fields.fieldText: Financial Year Grant Funding Remaining after Request

value.stringValue: [{"apiName":"Baseline_Version__c","guid":"column-a399","editable":false,"hasCustomHeaderLabel":false,"customHeaderLabel":"","wrapText":true,"order":0,"label":"Baseline Version","type":"customRichText"},{"apiName":"Challenge_Fund_Capital_Remaining__c","guid":"column-39c9","editable":false,"hasCustomHeaderLabel":true,"customHeaderLabel":"Capital Remaining","wrapText":true,"order":1,"label":"Challenge Fund Capital Remaining","type":"currency"},{"apiName":"Baseline_Total_Spend__c","guid":"column-9637","editable":false,"hasCustomHeaderLabel":true,"customHeaderLabel":"Capital Requested","wrapText":true,"order":2,"label":"Baseline Total Spend","type":"currency"},{"apiName":"Baseline_Total_Grant_Spend__c","guid":"column-e5eb","editable":false,"hasCustomHeaderLabel":true,"customHeaderLabel":"Capital Remaining after Drawdown","wrapText":true,"order":3,"label":"Baseline Total Grant Spend","type":"currency"}]

fields.name: Copy_1_of_Copy_1_of_Appendix1
fields.fieldText:
APPENDIX 1 

 

GRANT DRAWDOWN REQUEST FORM 

 

CLAIM FOR PAYMENT OF GRANT 

 

This form must be used when you wish to claim an instalment of the Grant for spend incurred, when making a Grant Drawdown Request, as set out in the standard terms and conditions of in the Grant Funding Agreement.

 

Claims should be made two months in advance of the requested payment date, and claim amounts should align with the amounts forecast for that month in the monthly data upload. 

 

Claims should be made for spend incurred. Grant Recipients do not need to wait for work to be invoiced or paid before they can claim for costs incurred (defined as any Eligible Expenditure committed and accrued, as long as the activity is due for completion within the Funding Period which is defined in the GFA). 

 

You are not required to submit evidence of spend incurred alongside this claim form.  

However, proof of spend incurred will be required separately, as a minimum as part of the Evidence Check (Reconciliation) process that is carried out three times per year. We may request, and You must supply, proof of expenditure and any other supporting documentation and information (in addition to the Grant Drawdown Request Form) as We require.

fields.name: Copy_2_of_thankyou
fields.fieldText: Thank you for submitting a grant drawdown request, this will now be reviewed internally and either approved or rejected.

screens.name: Drawdown_Request_for_this_month_already_exists
screens.label: Drawdown Request for this month already exists

fields.name: Drawdownalreadyexists
fields.fieldText: A Grant Drawdown Request has already been submitted for this month, please wait till next month to submit a new one.

fields.name: Copy_1_of_Copy_1_of_No_Phase_Baselines
fields.fieldText:
The total of your Capital and A&A Costs exceeds the remaining grant amount you have left in this financial year.


Please review your request and update it to ensure it does not exceed the remaining amount.

fields.name: noapprovedphaserequestfound
fields.fieldText:
Grant Drawdown Request for {!Get_Award_Baseline.Baseline_Version__c}


Your first Phase Request has yet to be approved. You can still submit a drawdown request based on the rules below

fields.name: maynotdrawdownnophaserequest
fields.fieldText: You may not drawdown more than 20% (15% A&A and 5% capital) of your total funding prior to approval of your first phase request and approval of an FMP and FRA.

fields.name: Total_Capital_Costs_Only
fields.helpText: This is up to 5% of your overall grant funding figure as no phase request in place

validationRule.errorMessage: Capital Costs cannot be more than 5% of the total grant funding

fields.name: A_A_Costs
fields.helpText: This is up to 15% of your overall grant funding figure

validationRule.errorMessage: A&A Costs cannot be more than 15% of the total grant funding

fields.name: Copy_1_of_No_Phase_Baselines
fields.fieldText:
There is currently no "Active" financial year baseline for this funding award for the current financial year.


Please review your financial year baselines to ensure they're up to date or contact an administrator for support, thank you.

fields.name: Copy_1_of_Baselineversion
fields.fieldText: Grant Drawdown Request for {!StrategicFYBaselineRecord.Baseline_Version__c}

fields.name: Remaining_Grant_after_Drawdown_Request
fields.fieldText: Financial Year Grant Funding Remaining after Drawdown Request

fields.name: drawdownrequesttext1
fields.fieldText: Grant Drawdown Request for {!Get_Award_Baseline.Baseline_Version__c}

fields.name: Copy_1_of_Copy_1_of_Remaining_Grant_after_Drawdown_Request
fields.fieldText: Financial Year Grant Funding Remaining after Request

value.stringValue: [{"apiName":"Baseline_Version__c","guid":"column-a399","editable":false,"hasCustomHeaderLabel":false,"customHeaderLabel":"","wrapText":true,"order":0,"label":"Baseline Version","type":"customRichText"},{"apiName":"Challenge_Fund_Capital_Remaining__c","guid":"column-39c9","editable":false,"hasCustomHeaderLabel":true,"customHeaderLabel":"Capital Remaining","wrapText":true,"order":1,"label":"Challenge Fund Capital Remaining","type":"currency"},{"apiName":"Baseline_Total_Spend__c","guid":"column-9637","editable":false,"hasCustomHeaderLabel":true,"customHeaderLabel":"Capital Requested","wrapText":true,"order":2,"label":"Baseline Total Spend","type":"currency"},{"apiName":"Baseline_Total_Grant_Spend__c","guid":"column-e5eb","editable":false,"hasCustomHeaderLabel":true,"customHeaderLabel":"Capital Remaining after Drawdown","wrapText":true,"order":3,"label":"Baseline Total Grant Spend","type":"currency"}]

fields.name: Baselineversion
fields.fieldText: Grant Drawdown Request for {!StrategicFYBaselineRecord.Baseline_Version__c}

fields.name: FMPFRAWarning
fields.fieldText: You may not drawdown more than 20% (15% A&A and 5% capital) of your total funding prior to approval of your first phase request and approval of an FMP and FRA.

validationRule.errorMessage: Capital Costs cannot be more than the total financial year grant funding remaining

fields.name: Admin_Costs
fields.helpText: This is up to 15% of overall grant funding figure

validationRule.errorMessage: A&A Costs cannot be more than the total financial year grant funding remaining

fields.name: thankyou
fields.fieldText: Thank you for submitting a grant drawdown request, this will now be reviewed internally and either approved or rejected.

fields.name: Thankyoudisplay
fields.fieldText: Thank you for submitting a grant drawdown request, this will now be reviewed internally and either approved or rejected.
